title: Neolehmannia peperomia
side_effects: Neolehmannia peperomia is a species that has not been extensively studied, and therefore, reliable information on its side effects is limited. However, as with many plants, potential side effects may include allergic reactions, skin irritation, or digestive issues if ingested. Ingestion of Neolehmannia peperomia can also lead to interactions with certain medications. Further research is needed to understand the full potential of Neolehmannia peperomia and its effects on humans. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using Neolehmannia peperomia for medicinal purposes.
